basic_details.job_title: NABFINS Business Strategist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Business Strategist: Chartered Accountant (CA) with 5-10 years of experience in BFSI/NBFC/Banking sector.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NABFINS Business Strategist (Qualified Chartered Accountant) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NABFINS Business Strategist position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Business Strategist position at NABFINS is 22nd June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the required qualification for the Business Strategist role?
faq.answer: The essential qualification for the Business Strategist post is being a Chartered Accountant (CA) with a minimum of 5 years of experience in the BFSI, NBFC, or Banking sector.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to send their resume via email to [email protected] to apply for this position.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Business Strategist post in NABFINS.

faq.question: Q6. What is the experience required for the Business Strategist role?
faq.answer: Candidates should have 5 to 10 years of relevant experience in the BFSI, NBFC, or Banking sector.

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website of NABFINS?
faq.answer: The official website of NABARD Financial Services (NABFINS) is https://nabfins.org.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is Nabfins/OPS/1105.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Business Strategist position is a full-time job opportunity.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NABFINS located?
faq.answer: NABFINS is located in Bengaluru, Karnataka, with a pincode of 560070.
